name: Spell LevelSpell
summary: If your human character has the Mark of Handling, the following traits replace the human's Ability Score Increase trait found in the Player's Handbook

traits.name: Wild Intuition
traits.summary: Whenever you make a Wisdom (Animal Handling) or a Intelligence (Nature) check, you can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to the total ability check.

traits.name: Primal Connection
traits.summary: You can cast theAnimal Friendshipspell and theSpeak With Animalswith this trait, requiring no material components. Once you cast either spell with this trait, you can't cast that spell again until you finish a Long Rest. Wisdom is your Spellcasting Ability for these spells.

traits.name: The Bigger They Are
traits.summary: Starting at 3rd level, you can target a Beast or a Monstrosity when you castAnimal FriendshiporSpeak With Animals, provided that the creature's intelligence is 3 or lower.

traits.name: Spells of the Mark
traits.summary: If you have the Spellcasting or Pact Magic class feature, the spells on the Mark of Handling Spells table are added to the spell list of your Spellcasting class.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Your Wisdom score increases by 2, and one other Ability Score of your choice increases by 1.
